original_question: Jaime places eggs on the tray. Each tray can hold 24 eggs. If he has 64 eggs and 2 trays, how many eggs won't he be able to place on the tray? Let's think step by step and output the final answer after "####".

similar_questions.question: Maria places oranges in the basket. Each basket can hold 30 oranges. If she has 82 oranges and 3 baskets, how many oranges won't she be able to place in the basket?
Tom places books on the shelf. Each shelf can hold 15 books. If he has 50 books and 4 shelves, how many books won't he be able to place on the shelf?
Lily places apples in the box. Each box can hold 20 apples. If she has 70 apples and 3 boxes, how many apples won't she be able to place in the box?
Kevin places toys in the bin. Each bin can hold 18 toys. If he has 52 toys and 2 bins, how many toys won't he be able to place in the bin?
Sophie places candies in the jar. Each jar can hold 25 candies. If she has 97 candies and 4 jars, how many candies won't she be able to place in the jar?
